identity.name: Cosmic Zen - The Anti-AI Wellness App

headings.usage: Use for all H1-H3. Essential for the 'ancient wisdom' feel.

body.usage: Use for all UI text, inputs, and long-form reading. High legibility.

accents.usage: Use sparingly for 'Enlightenment' keywords or very large short phrases.

usage_rules.transparency: Never use solid cards. Always use semi-transparent glass layers to let the background nebula shine through.
usage_rules.text_contrast: Ensure text is always readable against complex backgrounds. Use 'drop-shadow-md' on text if needed.

alignment.rule: Never center long paragraphs. Left align for readability.

buttons.primary: rounded-full px-8 py-3 bg-white/10 hover:bg-white/20 border border-white/20 backdrop-blur-md text-white transition-all duration-300 shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(255,255,255,0.1)] hover:shadow-[0_0_30px_rgba(255,255,255,0.2)]
buttons.secondary: rounded-full px-6 py-2 text-sm text-muted-foreground hover:text-white transition-colors

cards.glass: rounded-3xl border border-white/10 bg-black/20 backdrop-blur-xl shadow-xl overflow-hidden hover:border-white/20 transition-all duration-500
cards.interactive: cursor-pointer hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-2xl transition-all duration-300 group

inputs.style: bg-white/5 border-white/10 focus:border-primary/50 rounded-xl px-4 py-3 text-white placeholder:text-white/20 backdrop-blur-sm

BreathingCircle.description: A central animated circle that expands and contracts. MUST use framer-motion.
BreathingCircle.visuals: Multiple concentric rings with different opacities (10%, 20%, 40%). Glow effect essential.

MoodBoard.description: Grid of emotive colors/images representing feelings.
MoodBoard.visuals: No text initially, just colors/gradients. Hover reveals emotion name.

transitions.page: initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }} animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }} exit={{ opacity: 0, y: -20 }} transition={{ duration: 0.6, ease: 'easeOut' }}

images.strategy: Use abstract cosmic textures for backgrounds, and high-quality zen photography for cards.

universal_guidelines: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur)
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all. This results in breaking transforms.
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add .App { text-align: center; } in the css file.
NEVER use AI assistant Emoji characters for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable.
Ensure all interactive elements have data-testid attribute.
This project uses .js/.jsx, so do NOT use TypeScript syntax in examples.
